steps.title: Recall density formula
steps.content: Density is defined as mass divided by volume: $$\text{density} = \frac{\text{mass}}{\text{volume}}$$.

steps.title: Compute density
steps.content: Substitute mass = 308 g and volume = 28 cm³: $$\frac{308\text{ g}}{28\text{ cm}^3}$$ . Divide both numerator and denominator by 28: $$\frac{308\div 28}{28\div 28} = \frac{11}{1} = 11$$ . That matches choice A — A is correct.
